package rulecoverage

func PositiveWeakCrypto() string {
    ruleID := "weak_crypto"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Direct use of weak standard-library crypto packages such as crypto/md5, crypto/sha1, crypto/des, and crypto/rc4."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
